title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
summary: xAI's Grok 5, a 1.5 trillion-parameter model, has reportedly finished training and is being positioned as a coding-focused AI agent. The model allegedly incorporates developer workflow data and connects to tools like Cursor and Grok Build for software engineering tasks. xAI is launching Grok Build, a terminal-based coding agent, to compete directly with OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic's Claude in AI-assisted development.
